Ensure each <details> has a single panel wrapper after <summary>.
If there are multiple siblings after summary, wrap them in a <div>.
This gives VT and ARIA a stable single target per panel.

Connects to any <audio> element via the `for` attribute (matching an ID),
draws frequency or waveform data on a canvas. Separated from <audio-player>
so it can pair with any audio source independently.
declarations.name: AudioVisualizerElement
isValidPath
declarations.description: Validate that a path is safe (no expressions, only property access)

declarations.name: getValueByPath
declarations.description:
Safely get a value from an object using a property path
Returns undefined for invalid paths or missing properties

Security: Only simple property paths are allowed - no expressions, methods, or template literals.

Attributes:
- src: URL to fetch JSON data from
- data-items: Inline JSON data
- data-key: Property to use as unique key for items

Binding Attributes:
- data-field="path" - Set textContent from property path
- data-field-attr="href: url, title: name" - Set attributes from property paths
- data-field-html="richContent" - Set innerHTML (sanitized)
- data-field-if="propertyPath" - Show element if truthy
- data-field-unless="propertyPath" - Hide element if truthy
declarations.name: CardList

members.name: setItems
members.description: Programmatically set items

members.name: getItems
members.description: Get current items

declarations.description:
Scroll-snap carousel with prev/next buttons, dot indicators, autoplay,
keyboard navigation, and full ARIA. Progressive enhancement: renders
as a simple flex scroll without JS.

When transition is set and View Transitions API is supported,
switches to stacked-grid layout with animated slide transitions.

Wraps related <ins> and <del> elements into a reviewable unit with
toggle controls. Users can switch between tracking view (both visible),
final text (only insertions), or original text (only deletions).

The CSS handles view states via data-view attribute; the JS adds
interactive toggle controls.

declarations.description:
Progressive enhancement: semantic table → CSS chart → SVG chart.
Supports five data sources:
  1. JS property (.data)
  2. data-values attribute (JSON)
  3. <script type="application/json"> child
  4. <template data-chart-data> child
  5. Child <table> extraction
declarations.name: ChartWc

members.description: Resolve chart type from data-type attribute (or table's data-type).

Ensure the shadow DOM container exists. Create it if needed.
Shadow DOM isolates SVC's internal HTML/CSS from VB's cascade,
preventing style conflicts. CSS custom properties still inherit through.

declarations.description:
Light DOM, FormAssociated web component. Reuses VB's textarea[data-grow]
auto-init for auto-resizing. Handles Enter to submit, Shift+Enter for
newline, Escape to clear.
declarations.name: ChatInput

declarations.description:
Wires chat-thread, chat-input, participant data, and an optional model
selector into a composed shell. Handles the send → typing → response cycle.

Transport: when `endpoint` is set, uses built-in fetch(). When omitted,
dispatches `chat-window:send` so consumers can provide their own transport.
In both cases, the typing indicator is shown while awaiting a response.
Use `appendMessage()` or the typing element's `chat-bubble` to populate.

Participants: the `data-participants` JSON map uses arbitrary string IDs.
The local user's messages are always created with `data-from="user"`.
The agent is resolved as the first participant with `role: "agent"`.
Override these defaults by choosing matching keys in your participant map.

Model: `model` is a property + attribute. Setting the property updates the
`<select data-model-select>` if present. The attribute is set at connect
time and updated when the select changes. There is no `observedAttributes`
— post-connect attribute mutations are not observed; use the property setter.
declarations.name: ChatWindow

members.name: #resolveExistingLabels
members.description: Resolve data-from-label for any SSR messages already in the thread

attributes.name: endpoint
attributes.description: API endpoint for chat requests (omit for custom transport)

attributes.name: model
attributes.description: Active model; synced with [data-model-select] (property-driven after connect)

events.name: chat-window:send
events.description: Dispatched when user sends a message and no endpoint is set.

Renders a row/grid of color swatches from a comma-separated list.

All layout styles are inline so the component works without external CSS.

Two elements work together: - : Inline reference that degrades to parenthetical text - : Container that collects and displays footnotes Usage:

Some textThis is a footnote continues.

Without JS: footnotes appear inline in parentheses With JS: footnotes become superscript links, collected at foot-notes
declarations.name: FootNotes

declarations.description:
Owns field-level validation timing (blur-first, then eager re-validate
after first error) and exposes a public API for the form coordinator.

Markup pattern:
  <form-field>
    <label for="name">Name</label>
    <input id="name" required
           aria-describedby="name-msg"
           data-message-valuemissing="Please enter your name" />
    <output id="name-msg" class="error" for="name" aria-live="polite"></output>
  </form-field>
declarations.name: FormField

Do not use it to load untrusted or user-generated HTML from third-party sources.

declarations.description:
A platform-native markdown viewer that resolves content from four slot types
(in priority order): `src` attribute, `<script type="text/markdown">`,
`<template data-md>`, or `<pre>` (recommended for progressive enhancement).

The default parser is `marked` (loaded lazily via dynamic import). Supply a
custom parser via the `.parser` property to bypass the default entirely.

Trust boundary: this component injects parsed HTML via innerHTML. It is
designed for rendering trusted markdown content. Do not use it with
untrusted or user-generated markdown from third-party sources without
enabling the `sanitize` attribute (Phase 3).
declarations.name: MarkdownViewer

members.name: #parser
members.description: Custom parser override (md string → html string)

members.name: parser
members.description: Custom parser function. Set to override the default marked parser.

members.description: Re-fetch the `src` URL and re-render.

members.name: #resolveMarkdown
members.description:
Resolve markdown string from the slot priority chain.
Returns null if `src` is set (handled separately via fetch).

declarations.description:
Enhances a static changelog with relative dates, filtering by
year/month/version, sort toggle, and a "recently updated pages" feed.
declarations.name: TimeIndex

attributes.description: URL for recently updated pages JSON
attributes.name: updates-src

declarations.description:
A container for displaying non-modal notifications. Toasts appear in a
fixed position and auto-dismiss after a configurable duration.
declarations.name: ToastMsg

members.name: show

type.text:
@param {string} options.message - The message to display
   * @param {string} [options.variant] - Variant: 'info', 'success', 'warning', 'error'
   * @param {number} [options.duration] - Auto-dismiss duration in ms (0 = no auto-dismiss)
   * @param {boolean} [options.dismissible=true] - Whether the toast can be manually dismissed
   * @param {string} [options.action] - Optional action button text
   * @param {Function} [options.onAction] - Callback when action button is clicked
   *

members.description: Show a toast notification

members.name: dismissAll
members.description: Dismiss all visible toasts

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Default auto-dismiss duration in ms (default: 5000, 0 = no auto-dismiss)

declarations.description:
Wraps a trigger element and provides a tooltip on hover/focus.
Primary mechanism: sets `interestfor` attribute on trigger, letting
the browser (or polyfill) handle hover/focus timing and show/hide.
Falls back to JS event listeners when interestfor is unavailable.
declarations.name: ToolTip

members.name: #updatePosition
members.description:
Position the tooltip relative to the trigger using JavaScript.
Uses fixed positioning to work correctly with top-layer popovers.

members.name: #positionCard
members.description:
Position the card variant relative to the trigger.
Center-aligned horizontally with top/bottom viewport flip.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Variant: omit for tooltip (default), 'card' for hover card

declarations.description:
Renders a font specimen with sample text, character grid, weight scale,
and optional type scale display using VB's 9-step system.
declarations.name: TypeSpecimen

declarations.description:
Renders a thumbnail + play button on load, replacing with an iframe
only when the user clicks. Privacy-first: uses youtube-nocookie.com.
declarations.name: YouTubePlayer

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Accessible title for iframe + play button

attributes.name: params
attributes.description: Raw query string appended to embed URL

attributes.name: thumbnail
attributes.description: Thumbnail resolution: hq | mq | sd | maxres

declarations.description:
Wraps a native <video> element (light DOM) with custom overlay controls
rendered in shadow DOM. The <video> and optional <details class="track-list">
stay in light DOM — if JS is unavailable, native controls and track links work.
declarations.name: VideoPlayerElement

attributes.name: autoplay
attributes.description: Start playing on load (subject to browser autoplay policy)

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: Loop single track or entire playlist
